title: tanacetum argenteum subsp. flabellifolium
intro: Tanacetum argenteum subsp. flabellifolium, also known as Silver Tansy or Fernleaf Tansy, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Tanacetum argenteum subsp. flabellifolium include its use in treating digestive issues, relieving pain and inflammation, and providing antiseptic properties to prevent infections. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to various health issues.
